## Summary

Describe the change and its purpose.

## Data-quality impact

- [ ] No cleaning behavior changed
- [ ] A hard-invalid rule changed
- [ ] A suspicious-data flag changed
- [ ] Schema or output columns changed

Explain any effect on row counts, flags, or reproducibility.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Pandas and Polars outputs remain equivalent where expected
- [ ] Documentation has been updated
- [ ] No large raw or generated data files were committed
